title: Default Pre-1.13 Minecraft Font
description:
Simple default Minecraft Font before 1.13.

Ignore incompatibility.
body:
# What is this resourcepack doing?
This resourcepack will provide you with the original minecraft font of the versions before 1.13 of minecraft.

## Why would I want it?
Minecraft updated/changed the font in later versions.                           
If you wish to use the font of earlier versions, this resourcepack will do it.
